cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: Either Croissant goes with Greta or Danish goes with $6.
Jade goes with exactly three of Ben, Cortado, Croissant, Maple, and $6.
Crimson goes with at least four of Dane, Espresso, Bagel, Hazelnut, and $7.
Dane's price is higher than both the Cortado order and the order in the Cobalt mug.
Either Dane goes with Espresso or Greta goes with Cortado.
Between Hazelnut and Maple, one goes with Espresso and the other with $5.
If Dane goes with $7, then Bagel does not go with Hazelnut.
Between Almond and Maple, one goes with Latte and the other with Croissant.
Greta, Danish, Jade, and $7 belong to different orders.
Either Ava goes with Onyx, or Ben goes with Cortado — but not both.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either Dough goes with Royce or Leech goes with 6 lb.
Mossbank goes with exactly three of Cody, Jig, Dough, Crappie, and 6 lb.
Foxglen goes with at least four of Esther, Popper, Corn, Catfish, and 7 lb.

If Esther goes with 7 lb, then Corn does not go with Catfish.
Between Bass and Crappie, one goes with Spinnerbait and the other with Dough.
Royce, Leech, Mossbank, and 7 lb belong to different catches.
Either Boone goes with Pinehollow, or Cody goes with Jig — but not both.
